div.p: Exception → Handler Fault → Double Fault → Triple Fault → Reset

ul.li:
Exception occurs during:
Handling another exception
Loading IDT entry
Stack operation (SS fault) Triple Fault = System Reset
CPU asserts RESET line Safe Double Fault Handler:

div.p: 2. Bulletproof Double Fault Handler nasm isr8: ; Double fault (vector 8) cli mov eax, 0xB8000 ; Direct VGA mov byte [eax], 'D' mov byte [eax+2], 'F' .halt: hlt jmp .halt
4. QEMU Debug Flag bash qemu -no-reboot -d int

g.text: CPU detects: Exception while handling exception
CPU: No more handlers to call

ol.li: Fault in double fault handler → TRIPLE FAULT

div.p: No error message No stack trace No debugging info Just silence and reboot.
SS (if ring change) ESP (if ring change) EFLAGS CS EIP ← fault point Error Code Handler's frame...

(potentially corrupt!) EFLAGS CS
EIP Error Code (0) DF handler frame...

text.tspan: // If this faults, we triple fault
// BUG: What if VGA not init?
